description_long: This is a high-ankle lace-up boot with a rich burgundy leather upper, featuring black metal eyelets and black laces in a criss-cross pattern. The boot has a thick, translucent brown rubber sole with visible yellow stitching around the welt, characteristic of classic work or street boots. A yellow and black woven pull tab is attached at the back of the collar, aiding in easy wear. The interior lining appears to be black, with a visible label at the heel collar. The overall construction is robust, with reinforced stitching along the seams and a rounded toe box. The boot is clean and shows no visible signs of wear, suggesting it is in new or like-new condition.
description: A burgundy high-ankle lace-up boot with black laces, yellow stitching, and a thick brown rubber sole. Features a yellow-black pull tab and robust leather construction.
description_view_0: Side view showing the burgundy leather upper, black laces, yellow stitching, and the yellow-black pull tab at the heel.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the rounded toe, criss-cross lacing, and symmetrical eyelet arrangement.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the smooth leather surface, sole profile, and the pull tab at the back.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the heel seam, pull tab, and the interior label at the collar.
